channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kenyans Asked to Pray for TikTok Star Fardosa Battling Health Issues
item.description: Fardosa, the TikTok sensation from Tukana who gained fame in late 2025, has caused concern among Kenyans after reports emerged about her health. Known for her humorous and authentic reactions to city ...

item.title: Fact Check: Viral Giraffe Videos on Highways Are AI Creations, Not Real Incidents
item.description: Several viral videos circulating on social media appear to show giraffes being injured while being transported on moving trucks. These clips, which include bizarre scenarios like giraffes colliding wi...

item.title: Cuba pardons 2,010 prisoners during Holy Week as US-Cuba talks continue
item.description: Cuba's government announced the pardon of 2,010 prisoners during Holy Week, framing the gesture as a humanitarian effort. This follows an earlier pledge in March to release a smaller number of inmates...

item.title: Exploring the Abrahamic Family House and the Challenges of Religious Coexistence
item.description: During a visit to Abu Dhabi, the Abrahamic Family House captured attention for its unique architectural design by David Adjaye, which situates a mosque, church, and synagogue side by side in a shared,...

item.title: PNP Reports Seven Drowning Incidents During Holy Week
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) reported that as of Good Friday, seven drowning incidents have occurred in different swimming areas across the country amid the ongoing Holy Week celebrations. Aut...

item.title: ODM Issues Show Cause Letter to Secretary-General Edwin Sifuna Over Party Indiscipline
item.description: The Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) has formally served its Secretary-General, Edwin Sifuna, with a show-cause letter over alleged acts of indiscipline. The letter, authored by party national chairpe...

item.title: Pre-wedding weight-loss injections gain popularity among Indian brides
item.description: In India, some soon-to-be brides and grooms are turning to prescription weight-loss drugs as part of their pre-wedding preparation. Clinics like Klarity Skin Clinic offer packages combining Mounjaro i...

item.title: Tanzania Ranks 9th Globally in Public-Private Partnership Expertise
item.description: Tanzania imeweka kielelezo cha kuwa kiongozi wa kikanda katika ujuzi wa Public-Private Partnership (PPP) ndani ya Jumuiya ya Afrika Mashariki (EAC), ikiwa imepanda hadi nafasi ya tisa duniani kwa idad...

item.title: Samantha Sotto Yambao Achieves New York Times Bestseller Status with Innovative Writing
item.description: Samantha Sotto Yambao, a Filipino author, has recently achieved recognition for her unique approach to storytelling, turning what she describes as a 'train of thought' into a compelling narrative that...

item.title: US Army Chief Forced to Retire Amid Iran Conflict, Pentagon Sees Major Leadership Changes
item.description: In a significant move shaking the Pentagon, US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth has abruptly forced Army Chief of Staff General Randy George into early retirement, cutting short his tenure just one and ...

item.title: NSCDC Sends 2,280 Personnel Across Kwara to Secure Easter Festivities
item.description: The Kwara State Command of the Nigeria Security and Civil Defence Corps (NSCDC) don deploy 2,280 officers across all 16 local government areas to ensure say Easter celebrations go smooth and peaceful....

item.title: Suicide attack on Domel police station in Bannu causes multiple civilian casualties
item.description: BANNU: A grave incident took place at Domel Police Station in Bannu where a suicide car bombing resulted in the deaths of five civilians and injuries to 13 others, including one policeman. Tragically,...

item.title: The Importance of Investing in Ontario’s Nuclear Energy Sector
item.description: Ontario faces rising living costs, prompting debate over energy investments. The province's nuclear sector, regarded as a world-class and domestically supported industry, is highlighted as a stable an...

item.title: Daily Horoscope Guidance for April 3, 2026
item.description: Sally Brompton’s horoscope for April 3, 2026, provides daily astrological guidance for all zodiac signs, highlighting opportunities and cautions in different areas of life. For those celebrating a bir...

item.title: India-Bangladesh Discuss Strengthening Defence Cooperation and Regional Security
item.description: In New Delhi, Bangladesh High Commissioner to India, Riaz Hamidullah, met the Chief of Army Staff of India, General Upendra Dwivedi, to discuss enhancing defence ties between the two nations. The meet...

item.title: Nyeri Governor Kahiga Stands by President Ruto Over Ongoing Development
item.description: Nyeri Governor Mutahi Kahiga has publicly defended his decision to support President William Ruto, emphasising that his backing is based on the government's performance in delivering development proje...

item.title: Blake Lively to proceed with lawsuit over contract and retaliation claims against Justin Baldoni
item.description: Blake Lively has announced that she will continue her legal case against director and co-star Justin Baldoni, despite a judge dismissing most of her initial claims, including sexual harassment, defama...

item.title: Celebrating Xhosa Coming-of-Age: The Role of Mothers in Mgidi
item.description: Mzansi Magic’s new reality series, 'Mgidi Moms', takes viewers into the heart of Xhosa culture, exploring the journey of boys transitioning into manhood through ulwaluko, a traditional initiation rite...

item.title: 'Drag Race Philippines' Season 4 Contestant Misua Dies at Age Unknown
item.description: Filipino audiences are mourning the loss of Misua, a contestant from Season 4 of 'Drag Race Philippines'. The news, reported by ABS-CBN, marks a sad moment in the local entertainment industry, as Misu...

item.title: Edmonton Oilers secure 3-1 victory over Chicago, ending Blackhawks' playoff hopes
item.description: The Edmonton Oilers extended their strong form with a 3-1 victory over the Chicago Blackhawks, marking their fifth consecutive win of the season. Matthew Savoie scored the decisive goal, while Adam He...
